related_chapters: Chapter 11: Emerging and Re-emerging Infectious Diseases
Chapter 25: Conflict, Displacement, and Humanitarian Health

learning_objectives.text: Define the epidemiology and global burden of major respiratory infections including tuberculosis, influenza, COVID-19, and pneumonia
Identify key risk factors and transmission dynamics of respiratory pathogens across different populations and settings
Describe the clinical presentations and diagnostic approaches for major respiratory infections
Explain the mechanisms of transmission prevention and infection control for respiratory pathogens
Compare different surveillance systems and approaches for respiratory infection monitoring
Summarize treatment protocols and public health management strategies for major respiratory diseases
Apply tuberculosis control strategies including DOTS and drug resistance management in diverse settings
Implement infection prevention and control measures in healthcare and community settings
Design respiratory infection surveillance systems appropriate for different resource contexts
Analyze the effectiveness of different pandemic preparedness and response strategies
Evaluate the impact of social determinants on respiratory infection outcomes
Assess the role of environmental factors in respiratory disease transmission and prevention
Develop integrated respiratory infection control programs combining clinical and public health approaches
Design comprehensive tuberculosis elimination strategies addressing drug resistance and social factors
Create pandemic preparedness frameworks incorporating lessons from COVID-19 and influenza responses
Critically evaluate respiratory infection control policies and their population health impact
Judge the effectiveness of different tuberculosis treatment regimens and programmatic approaches
Assess the quality and appropriateness of respiratory infection surveillance and response systems

key_topics.topic: COVID-19 pandemic response and lessons learned
Lower respiratory tract infections across age groups
Indoor air pollution and respiratory health
Infection prevention and control in healthcare
Treatment adherence and patient support systems
Health system impacts of respiratory pandemics
Social determinants and health equity in respiratory infections

case_studies.focus: Building influenza surveillance capacity in sub-Saharan Africa

case_studies.title: COVID-19 Response Comparison: New Zealand vs Brazil
case_studies.focus: Contrasting pandemic response strategies and outcomes

case_studies.focus: Integrated Management of Childhood Illness (IMCI) implementation
